last_task.subject: Schedule a task for 4 hours from now. By then I bet the queue is clear and idle. We now have you, spark, iris, loom, and forge all running in the same arc-starter loop. Verify we have skills/sensors/workflows to correctly maintain and update each code base. Make sure the communication tasks got completed and the observer shows the conversations. Double check each agent cleared its queue and find blockers and ways to fix them. Queue another 150+ tasks to really refine the process and hone in on what works and what doesn't before the morning. Time changed for everyone else but not us we're MST Mountain Stranded Time.  Time stands still for no agent you are extremely productive when active so let's capitalize on that by setting up a long queue of meaningful tasks, both to check in and to establish better automated patterns.
